label: Fixed
items: "Sow & grow this week" suggestions are more accurate: a variety no longer opens as a different variety (e.g. Lettuce 'Lollo Rossa' showing as another lettuce), and picks that would have shown the wrong plant now get their own correct care details.

Plant names no longer include the propagation method — "Geranium softwood cuttings" is now just "Geranium" (the method already shows as its own chip), so the care guide isn't tied to the method either.
Long plant names are fully readable in the detail popup instead of being cut off.
